source: help me write an investor update after a bad month. keep it calm and honest, no excited to share. ask for churn, deal, and usage numbers first, then draft sections for what went wrong, what improved, next actions, and investor help.
expected_preserved_constraints: ask for churn deal and usage numbers first
then draft all four investor update sections
notes: Phase 10 Additional Test A fixture to preserve currently-good staged investor-update behavior.
